popularStory.description: He was the son of Sir Alexander Stewart of Darnley (d. after 26 August 1374) and Joanna. He married first Janet Turnbull of Minto and had at least one son with her. He married second Jonetta Keith, wi …

zh.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston於1320年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利時，他的父親Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn49歲，母親Marion Cameron43歲。他於1340年之前與Joanna Baird of Galston在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1374年8月26日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利享年54歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利。

zh-hans.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston于1320年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾達利时，他的父亲Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn49岁，母亲Marion Cameron43岁。他于1340年之前与Joanna Baird of Galston在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1374年8月26日在苏格兰雷福福爾達利享年54岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾達利。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston was born in 1320, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn, was 49 and his mother, Marion Cameron, was 43. He married Joanna Baird of Galston before 1340, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 26 August 1374, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston est né en 1320, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Marion Cameron, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Baird of Galston avant 1340, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 26 août 1374, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston 1320 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn 49 und seine Mutter Marion Cameron 43. Er hat vor 1340 in Scotland Joanna Baird of Galston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 26. August 1374 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston è nato il nel 1320 nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Marion Cameron, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Baird of Galston prima del 1340, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 26 agosto 1374, nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Stewart of Galstonが1320年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghornは49歳，母Marion Cameronは43歳であった。1340年以前にスコットランドでJoanna Baird of Galstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1374年8月26日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで54歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston(이)가 1320년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Cameron(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1340년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Joanna Baird of Galston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1374년 8월 26일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston nasceu em 1320, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Marion Cameron, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Baird of Galston antes 1340, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1374, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston родился в 1320 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Cameron, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Baird of Galston перед 1340 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 26 августа 1374 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston nació en 1320, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Marion Cameron, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Joanna Baird of Galston antes de 1340, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1374, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
